text: 一方面呢 还没有动手术之前， 脚 手会比较麻痹。 动了手术之后呢
traditional_chinese: 一方面，在手術前，腳手會較為麻痺；手術後，
English: On the one hand, before surgery, the foot and hand often felt quite numb. After surgery,
Vietnamese: Một mặt, trước khi phẫu thuật, bàn chân và bàn tay sẽ khá tê. Sau khi phẫu thuật,
French: D'une part, avant l'opération, le pied et la main seront assez engourdis. Après l'opération,
German: Einerseits, bevor die Operation durchgeführt wird, werden Fuß und Hand ziemlich taub sein. Nach der Operation
